outputPreview: Entity-family ownership is concentrated in `tests/integration/entities/{entity}_flat/` for runtime behavior and `tests/integration/tech_options/{entity}_techs/` for tech catalogs. Drone ownership is detailed in `test_drone_flat_tech_spawn_and_on_kill.gd`, `test_drone_flat_init_respawn_and_populate.gd`, and `test_drone_flat_core_tick_and_targeting.gd`.
